metadata.description: KESA-based Critical Information Infrastructure (CII) vulnerability assessment skills. Technical (424 items), Administrative (127 items), Physical (9 items) security evaluation based on Korean Information Security Agency (KISA) guidelines.

plugins.name: kesekit-en
plugins.description: CII vulnerability assessment skills (English). start(full technical/administrative/physical security audit), check(CII compliance pre-deployment checklist), fix(auto-fix vulnerabilities with hardening scripts), guide(generate secure coding prompts for AI tools).

plugins.name: kesekit-ko
plugins.description: 주요정보통신기반시설 취약점 분석평가 스킬 (한국어). start(기술/관리/물리 보안 전체 감사), check(CII 컴플라이언스 배포 전 체크리스트), fix(취약점 자동 수정 + 보안설정 스크립트), guide(AI 도구용 시큐어코딩 프롬프트 생성).
